title: Verify Manage Trial section is accessible from multiple entry points
description: Test that all designated entry points lead to the same Trial Corner Manage section

steps.description: 1. Access Manage Trial from homepage widget
2. Access Manage Trial from floating pill
3. Access Manage Trial from profile icon
4. Verify all lead to same Trial Corner with Manage Trial section

expected_result: All entry points navigate to same Trial Corner page with consistent Manage Trial options
